changelog.v1.0.0: Offline cache with cached data indicator, L1/R1 error handling, WiFi retry/continue on launch, new logo and splash screen.
changelog.v0.2.0: PakKit keyboard for location search, updated README, pinned PakKit v0.2.0.
changelog.v1.1.0: Scroll bounce fix using PakKit scroll helper, standardized build system.
